void open_gripper(){

// *** WARNING: Invalid license or undefined post processor to generate code for gripper***
// *** The following program will not work on the gripper controller ***
// *** For more information:  https://robodk.com/  ***

// Program generated by RoboDK v5.9.3 for gripper on 22/05/2026 11:21:21
// Using nominal kinematics.
MoveJ(Joints(50.000000));
return;
}
